---
title: "eCommerceDB"
page-layout: article
---

# eCommerceDB

## Description

Global e-commerce database covering online retailers, revenue, market development, competitors, traffic, and digital commerce indicators. Supports retail, consumer behavior, and digital economy research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Technology & Innovation
- **Data/resource type:** Market Research, Government & International Statistics, Data Platform
- **Access model:** Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Market Research, Government & International Statistics, Data Platform

## Access notes

Also accessible via Statista.

## Links

- [Access resource](https://library.yale.edu/eresources/access/access-ecommercedb)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
